headline: Tanger CEO Stephen Yalof: Nike and Lululemon are outperforming despite consumer concerns
summary: Stephen Yalof, Tanger CEO, joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the latest insights from the company's consumers, the business strength in Florida and much more.

headline: Financial Accounting Foundation picks new member of GASAC
summary: Joel Levy’s tenure began on 1 June 2026 and will be completed on 31 December 2027.

headline: Target’s Upgraded Outlook and Supply Chain Expansion Might Change The Case For Investing In Target (TGT)
summary: In recent weeks, Target has reported strong first-quarter results, raised its full-year revenue growth outlook, launched its June Target Circle Deal Days event, and opened a US$367 million food distribution center in Colorado to enhance freshness and replenishment speed for 129 stores across 11 states. Analysts and media commentators now emphasize that improved operations, merchandising upgrades, and expanding membership and supply chain capabilities are reshaping how investors view Target's...

headline: Target hijacks Amazon to keep winning shoppers back
summary: For the past year, many big retailers have been battling to attract the cash-strapped American consumers. Then there’s Target, which also faced a set of challenges of its own, stemming from several controversies and boycotts over its Pride collection and the scaling back of its DEI (diversity, ...
